title: M.P. High Court cancels Congress MLA’s win for hiding criminal cases, declares former BJP Minister elected
description: A Single Bench of Justice Gurpal Singh Ahluwalia in Gwalior gave the verdict in an Election Petition filed by Mr. Rawat and said that Congress MLA Mukesh Malhotra has “deliberately and knowingly suppressed material information regarding framing of charges in two pending criminal cases and misled the electorate”.
